data.title: Jupiter Pro: Platform display data issues have been resolved and performance has not been affected
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Jupiter Pro posted on the X platform that due to problems with the infrastructure provider, there were problems with the display of data (including charts and prices displayed in the UI). The platform data has now been restored online and performance has not been affected. At the same time, data is being filled in parallel, and all on-chain exchanges, triggered orders, etc. are operating normally.

data.title: Illegal Cryptocurrency Mining Operation Uncovered in Russia
data.description:
According to PANews, Russian authorities in the Republic of Buryatia discovered an illegal cryptocurrency mining operation during a routine inspection of power lines in the Lake Baikal region. The operation was concealed inside a Kamaz truck, which was drawing electricity from a 10-kilovolt line. The truck contained 95 mining devices and a mobile substation. However, two individuals involved in the operation fled the scene in an SUV before the police arrived.

Buryat Energy Company, a subsidiary of Siberian Power Company, reported that there have been six cases of electricity theft related to cryptocurrency mining since the beginning of this year.

data.title: Strategy founder Michael Saylor: Global capital will flow into the Bitcoin network, and the United States should make arrangements as soon as possible
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Strategy founder Michael Saylor said that all global capital will gradually flow to digital spaces such as the Bitcoin network. He believes that the United States should hold as much Bitcoin as possible as early as possible to seize the opportunity before other countries in the world realize its value. Saylor emphasized that the Bitcoin network, as a decentralized financial infrastructure, will become the core of future capital flows.

data.title: Michael Saylor Advocates for U.S. Investment in Bitcoin
data.description: According to Odaily, Strategy founder Michael Saylor has expressed that global capital will increasingly move towards digital spaces like the Bitcoin network. He believes that the United States should acquire as much Bitcoin as possible at an early stage to gain an advantage before other countries recognize its value. Saylor emphasized that the Bitcoin network, as a decentralized financial infrastructure, will be central to future capital flows.
